zh.lifeSummary: 當James Radcliffe於1410年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾查阿德頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Radcliffe34歲，母親Cecilia de   Ashton38歲。他於1428年與Agnes Euby在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1446年3月4日在英國藍卡爾博爾頓享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Radcliffe于1410年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾查阿德頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Radcliffe34岁，母亲Cecilia de   Ashton38岁。他于1428年与Agnes Euby在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1446年3月4日在英国藍卡爾博爾頓享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Radcliffe was born in 1410, in Chadderton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Radcliffe, was 34 and his mother, Cecilia de   Ashton, was 38. He married Agnes Euby in 1428, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 March 1446, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Radcliffe est né en 1410, à Chadderton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Radcliffe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Cecilia de   Ashton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Euby en 1428, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1446, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Radcliffe 1410 in Chadderton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Radcliffe 34 und seine Mutter Cecilia de   Ashton 38. Er hat 1428 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England Agnes Euby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. März 1446 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bolton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Radcliffe è nato il nel 1410 nel Chadderton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Radcliffe, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia de   Ashton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Euby nel 1428, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1446, nel Bolton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Radcliffeが1410年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアチャッドエルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Radcliffeは34歳，母Cecilia de   Ashtonは38歳であった。1428年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフでAgnes Eubyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1446年3月4日にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Radcliffe(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 채더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Radcliffe(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia de   Ashton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1428년 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 Agnes Euby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 3월 4일 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Radcliffe nasceu em 1410, em Chadderton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Radcliffe, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de   Ashton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Euby em 1428, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1446, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Radcliffe родился в 1410 г. в местности чэддиртон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Radcliffe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de   Ashton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Euby в 1428 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 марта 1446 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Radcliffe nació en 1410, en Chadderton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Radcliffe, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Cecilia de   Ashton, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Agnes Euby en 1428, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1446, en Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
